title: Department Manager Vacancy at Poorvika Mobiles - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Poorvika Mobiles - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Department Manager with drive and ambition, Poorvika Mobiles in Raipur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Poorvika Mobiles:
Poorvika Mobiles is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Poorvika Mobiles!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
